hooks.command: file="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$file" == *.env ]]; then echo 'BLOCKED: Cannot edit .env files (contains secrets). Edit .env.example instead.' >&2; exit 2; fi
file="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$file" == *.py ]]; then cd /opt/agent-memory-unified && ruff check --fix "$file" 2>/dev/null; ruff format "$file" 2>/dev/null; fi
